symbols: church tower rising above the cityscape — the presence of the sacred amid the everyday
description: A watercolor cityscape showing the Eglise Saint Gervais rising above surrounding buildings and lush green trees. The church features a prominent yellow-gold bell tower and a dark pitched roof. In the foreground, a riverbank with a stone quay holds a barge and smaller boats. A yellow house with blue shutters sits at mid-ground. The sky is gray and overcast, rendered in loose watercolor washes. The brushwork is bold and gestural throughout.
